title: Touch of Orobas
description: Upon pickup, replace your starter Relic with an Ancient version.
flavor: Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...
notes: This relic upgrades your starter relic to an Ancient version. The specific upgraded relic depends on your starter relic: Burning Blood → Black Blood, Ring of the Snake → Ring of the Drake, Divine Right → Divine Destiny, Bound Phylactery → Phylactery Unbound, Cracked Core → Infused Core. Other starter relics upgrade to Circlet.
